topic: 诸葛亮和曹操不为人知的故事
full_script: 诸葛亮和曹操，少人知的一段暗线。赤壁前联吴抗曹，两人在天下棋盘上多次间接对位，却鲜少同屏署名。更少人提的是地理暗线：诸葛亮早年随叔父离徐州，曹操亦曾活动于那一带，时间线上两家有过擦肩。后世爱对比法度与权谋，却少提他们如何把散乱资源整合成可用体系——这才是硬核侧面。你还知道哪些被演义盖住的细节？评论区聊聊，一起挖。

scenes.voiceover: 诸葛亮和曹操，少人知的一段暗线。
scenes.subtitle: 诸葛亮和曹操，少人知的一段暗线。

scenes.voiceover: 赤壁前联吴抗曹，两人在天下棋盘上多次间接对位，却鲜少同屏署名。
scenes.subtitle: 赤壁前联吴抗曹，棋盘上间接对位。
scenes.ref_prompt: Period-accurate historical recreation of late Eastern Han / early Three Kingdoms Chinese riverbank military camp at dusk. Wide shot: command tents with rolled bamboo maps on wooden stands, oil lamps, lamellar armor racks, silken banners without readable characters. Medium-wide: two clusters of advisors in layered hemp and silk robes suggesting rival camps across a misty shoreline, silhouettes and spatial separation implying indirect confrontation, not face-to-face dialogue. East Asian adults with natural East Asian facial features, period-appropriate Chinese-style hair buns and sashes. Cinematic realistic, soft overcast light, slow tripod push-in, vertical 9:16, native portrait upright framing, no readable text, no logos, no fast whip pans. no readable text, subtitles, street signs, or on-screen UI.

scenes.voiceover: 更少人提的是地理暗线：诸葛亮早年随叔父离徐州，曹操亦曾活动于那一带，时间线上两家有过擦肩。
scenes.subtitle: 徐州一带，两家曾有地理暗线。

scenes.voiceover: 后世爱对比法度与权谋，却少提他们如何把散乱资源整合成可用体系——这才是硬核侧面。
scenes.subtitle: 法度与权谋之外，资源整合更硬核。
scenes.ref_prompt: Period-accurate interior of a Chinese-style administrative hall and adjoining armory courtyard from the same era. Stone-laid courtyard with weapon racks, straw bundles, wooden crates, and registry tables with blank bamboo slips (no legible writing). Officials in layered robes organizing supplies; soldiers in Chinese-style lamellar armor stacking equipment in slow, simple motions. East Asian figures with natural East Asian facial features, period Chinese costumes. Emphasis on logistics and order: carts, rope coils, bronze vessel silhouettes. Cinematic realistic, warm lantern light, locked tripod medium shots, vertical 9:16, native portrait upright framing. no readable text, no logos. no intricate finger choreography or precision tool-in-hand manipulation.

scenes.voiceover: 你还知道哪些被演义盖住的细节？评论区聊聊，一起挖。
scenes.subtitle: 评论区聊聊被演义盖住的细节。
